input.input: Task: Find the stadium that hosted the final match of the 2023 Africa Cup of Nations and its total seating capacity. Then compute: capacity - 59,937 = NEXT_FILENAME (an integer). Produce a single small deliverable file at /_outputs/46_result.txt containing: (1) stadium name, (2) stadium total capacity (integer), (3) the subtraction and result (e.g., "65000 - 59937 = 5063"), and (4) the next filename (e.g., "5063.txt"). Use reliable sources and include 1–2 short citations in the file (URLs). Return only the path(s) to created file(s) plus a one-line summary. Do not return file contents here.

output:
/_outputs/46_result.txt

Created file. Summary: Alassane Ouattara Stadium — capacity 60,012; 60012 - 59937 = 75 → next filename 75.txt.
